title: dolichos sericeus subsp. sericeus
intro: Dolichos sericeus subsp. sericeus, also known as the silky dolichos, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as a diuretic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as diabetes and hypertension. The health benefits of Dolichos sericeus subsp. sericeus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of Dolichos sericeus subsp. sericeus, such as teas and infusions, can be made by boiling the plant's leaves and roots in water.
